# PingDS

> AI agents should consult [Docs for Agents](https://developer.pingidentity.com/build-with-ai/docs-for-agents.md)
> for guidance on navigating Ping Identity documentation.

## Pingds 8.1

- [1.3.6.1.4.1.26027.1.4.8.1.3.6.1.4.1.26027.1.3.6](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingds/8.1/schemaref/mr-1.3.6.1.4.1.26027.1.4.8.1.3.6.1.4.1.26027.1.3.6.md)
- [About directories](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingds/8.1/getting-started/directory-services.md): Introduction to LDAP directory concepts including data model, communication, controls, indexes, schema, access control, replication, and HTTP access.
- [About DS tools](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingds/8.1/ldap-guide/about-tools.md): Overview of PingDS command-line tools for LDAP operations, including trust store setup and default connection settings.
- [About indexes](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingds/8.1/config-guide/idx-about.md): Understand how PingDS uses indexes to respond quickly to LDAP searches, and how indexes are maintained when directory data changes.
- [About logs](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingds/8.1/logging-guide/about-logs.md): Overview of PingDS log types — access, audit, errors, and server — and the common audit event framework with message formats and filtering.
- [About password policies](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingds/8.1/security-guide/pwp-about.md): Reference for PingDS password policy attributes covering per-server and subentry policies, validators, and generators.
- [About replication](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingds/8.1/config-guide/repl-about.md): Understand how PingDS replication works, including eventually consistent updates, replication topology, port use, and connection selection.
- [About request handling](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingds/8.1/config-guide/request-handling.md): Overview of how PingDS connection handlers accept and route client requests through the core server to backends.

## Pingds release-notes

- [Deprecated](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingds/release-notes/deprecation.md): Lists functionality deprecated in PingDS releases that is likely to be removed in a future version.
- [Downloads](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingds/release-notes/downloads.md): Download PingDS server software, including packages for deployment as an LDAP directory server, proxy, or replication server.
- [Fixes](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingds/release-notes/fixes.md): Index of cumulative fix lists for PingDS major and minor versions, from 6.5.x through 8.1.x.
- [Fixes in 6.5.x](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingds/release-notes/fixes-6.5.md): Cumulative list of important fixes in PingDS 6.5.x maintenance releases.
- [Fixes in 7.0.x](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingds/release-notes/fixes-7.0.md): Cumulative list of important fixes in PingDS 7.0.x maintenance releases.
- [Fixes in 7.1.x](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingds/release-notes/fixes-7.1.md): Cumulative list of important fixes in PingDS 7.1.x maintenance releases.
- [Fixes in 7.2.x](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingds/release-notes/fixes-7.2.md): Cumulative list of important fixes in PingDS 7.2.x maintenance releases.
- [Fixes in 7.3.x](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingds/release-notes/fixes-7.3.md): Cumulative list of important fixes in PingDS 7.3.x maintenance releases.
- [Fixes in 7.4.x](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingds/release-notes/fixes-7.4.md): Cumulative list of important fixes in PingDS 7.4.x maintenance releases.
- [Fixes in 7.5.x](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingds/release-notes/fixes-7.5.md): Cumulative list of important fixes in PingDS 7.5.x maintenance releases.
- [Fixes in 8.0.x](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingds/release-notes/fixes-8.0.md): Cumulative list of important fixes in PingDS 8.0.x maintenance releases.
- [Fixes in 8.1.x](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingds/release-notes/fixes-8.1.md): Cumulative list of important fixes in PingDS 8.1.x maintenance releases.
- [Getting support](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingds/release-notes/support.md): Overview of Ping Identity support services, professional services, and documentation resources available for PingDS deployments.
- [Incompatible changes](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingds/release-notes/changes.md): Lists incompatible changes in PingDS releases that require action when upgrading, including command syntax, protocol, and behavior differences.
- [Interface stability](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingds/release-notes/stability.md): Describes PingDS interface stability classifications, including which APIs, commands, log messages, and configuration are Evolving or Internal.
- [Known issues](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingds/release-notes/known-issues.md): Lists known issues open at the time of each PingDS release, including Java version incompatibilities and other unresolved defects.
- [Limitations](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingds/release-notes/limitations.md): Describes inherent PingDS design limitations, including account lockout replication behavior and HDAP JSON attribute patching restrictions.
- [PingDS release notes](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingds/release-notes/preface.md): PingDS release notes covering multiple versions with quick links to downloads, requirements, fixes, and upgrade guidance.
- [Release timeline](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingds/release-notes/timeline.md): PingDS release timeline listing all major, minor, and maintenance releases with release dates and version numbers.
- [Removed](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingds/release-notes/removed.md): Lists functionality removed in PingDS releases, including commands, APIs, and configuration options no longer available.
- [Requirements](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingds/release-notes/requirements.md): Hardware, software, and platform requirements for deploying PingDS, including supported Java versions, OS, and Kubernetes environments.
- [Security advisories](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingds/release-notes/security-advisories.md): Links to PingDS security advisories published by Ping Identity to address vulnerabilities in collaboration with customers.
- [What&#8217;s new](https://docs.pingidentity.com/pingds/release-notes/whats-new.md): Lists new features and enhancements in PingDS releases, with version-specific upgrade notes for 8.1 and earlier versions.
